heading: Overview
body:
After loading your data or [Load Sample Data Into Atlas](sample-data), you can
use the Atlas UI to interact with the data in the following ways:

- [Atlas UI](atlas-ui-dbs) in your
  clusters.

- [check](atlas-ui-collections) in your
  clusters.

- [Create, View, Update, and Delete Documents](atlas-ui-docs) in your collections.

- [Atlas UI](atlas-ui-indexes) on your collections.

- [Aggregation Pipeline Builder](atlas-ui-agg-pipeline) to
  process data in your collections.

- [Atlas UI](de-shard-collection-for-global-writes)
  to distribute large datasets evenly.

- [Build charts](charts/launch-charts) to visualize data in your
  databases and collections.
